message:
fix(mux): commit untracked terminfo_renderer.rs referenced by lib.rs

This file was created but never committed. It is referenced by mod
statements in mux/src/lib.rs and actively used by ssh.rs and
termwiztermtab.rs. Without it the mux crate cannot compile from
a clean checkout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
